productDisplayName: ADIDAS Women Ess MF3S  Black Track Pant
description: Composition Black trackpants made of 92% polyester and 8% lycra, with broad elasticated waistband, adidas 3-Stripes in white tape down each outside leg, adidas logo printed on upper leg Fit Straight Wash care Wash dark colours separately below 40 degrees Do not soak, do not bleach, do not tumble dry Dry in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/trims/logo Do not dry clean Made of stretchable polyester fabric with a slight shine, these Adidas tracks are ideal for all your training needs. While the soft and broad elastic waistband sits snugly, the stretchable fabric moves with your body making everything easier - from yoga sessions to a gym workout. Pair it with a Sports t-shirt and performance shoes for ultimate comfort throughout an extended training session. Model statistics The trousers are size M, length 39” on a model of height 5'8” and waist 26”
